_publications._publicationTitle: Gene Expression, Network Analysis, and Drug Discovery of Neurofibromatosis Type 2-Associated Vestibular Schwannomas Based on Bioinformatics Analysis.

_contextSnippet: Based on ClinicalTrials.gov, we found that nilotinib was previously investigated for Phase 2 of growing VSs treatment and everolimus is being used in Phase 2 of the NF2 treatment study
details: Successfully identified that nilotinib was previously investigated in Phase 2 trials for growing vestibular schwannomas and everolimus is being used in Phase 2 NF2 treatment studies
